sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6999" key="a)namhru/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναμηρύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n6999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wind up, draw back,</tr_> as a thread, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.978d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
